note_on_counts: File/dir/LOC counts are no longer hand-maintained here. See docs/catalog/MODULE_REGISTRY.json (metrics block) generated by scripts/generate_catalog.py to keep numbers verifiable. As of P-FIX-5 (2026-07-22), `generate_catalog.py --check` recomputes metrics and renders Markdown in memory and diffs both against what is on disk - see docs/reference or tests/integration/test_catalog_drift_detection.py for the negative tests that prove it.

validation.python_tests: Verify by running `python -m pytest -q` - do not read a number from this file, it goes stale every tranche (that staleness was itself a 2026-07-22 review finding).
validation.catalog_verify: PASS (python scripts/generate_catalog.py --check) - as of P-FIX-5 this recomputes metrics and Markdown and fails on drift; verified with negative tests.

cvf_enforcement.2026-07-22_correction: A prior version of this file said 'golden_vertical: Operational Event -> confirm' and listed 8 controls as enforced. An independent review (docs/decisions/EA_INDEPENDENT_REVIEW_2026-07-22_CODEX.md) found that label was overbroad. A corrective tranche (P-FIX-0 through P-FIX-5, see docs/implementation/EXECUTION_ROADMAP.md) fixed the Critical/High findings. See docs/cvf/CVF_CONTROL_MAPPING.md for the current, evidence-based status of each control - this file only summarizes it and can drift, so treat CVF_CONTROL_MAPPING.md as authoritative.
fixed_by_pfix_tranche: freeze (P-FIX-1: now load-bearing, cross-record, both backends)
audit (P-FIX-2: now atomic with mutation, both backends)
evidence (P-FIX-3: now persisted through SqlLedger for events and tasks)
approval (P-FIX-3: now rejects fabricated/inflated approver claims via known-principals.yaml - interim, not full auth)

notes: Zalo and WhatsApp are mock/conformance skeletons until official credentials and API approval are available.
Production hardening remains gated by Phase 5 acceptance evidence.

Persistence: SqlLedger (SQLite verified end-to-end incl. FK/CHECK/evidence/atomic-rollback; PostgreSQL schema defect fixed in P-FIX-4 but never run live - no Docker in this environment) plus InMemoryLedger for tests/offline. See operations-ledger entry in the module catalog.
Do not treat this file as current without cross-checking docs/catalog/MODULE_CATALOG.md and SESSION/ACTIVE_SESSION_STATE.json - front-door drift was itself a finding of the 2026-07-22 review.
